name: defou-workflow
description: 将原始想法转化为结构清晰、判断明确、具有长期价值的“得否”风格内容报告。
capabilities: Analyzes raw ideas and generates 3 distinct angles for content
Creates 5 content templates: experience, counter-intuitive, list, case study, growth
Produces 4 hook variations per content piece
Scores viral potential across 4 dimensions (curiosity, resonance, clarity, share value)
Recommends optimal posting times based on content type
author: wangdefou-dev
securitySummary: All 20 static findings are false positives. The static scanner misidentified JSON description text as cryptographic content, markdown syntax as shell commands, and YAML frontmatter as encrypted data. This is a pure content creation workflow with no network, command execution, or data exfiltration capabilities.
valueStatement: Content creators struggle to transform scattered ideas into compelling, structured posts. This workflow provides a systematic approach to brainstorming, writing, and optimizing content for maximum engagement using proven viral content patterns.
userTitle: Create viral content with Defou workflow
limitations: Outputs content in Simplified Chinese only
Follows specific Defou style guidelines only
Does not publish directly to social media platforms

useCases.title: Streamline content production
useCases.description: Generate weeks of content ideas in minutes using systematic templates and viral scoring.

useCases.title: Build consistent voice
useCases.description: Create on-brand content that aligns with the Defou counter-consensus style.

useCases.title: Scale content output
useCases.description: Transform raw notes into polished, shareable posts with optimal posting times.

promptTemplates.title: Basic content analysis
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze this content idea and create a Defou-style report: [paste your notes or topic]

promptTemplates.title: Counter-intuitive angle
promptTemplates.prompt: Find the counter-intuitive angle in this topic and generate all 5 content templates: [topic]

promptTemplates.title: Platform optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate content for this topic and include viral potential scores for each piece: [topic]

promptTemplates.title: Full workflow execution
promptTemplates.prompt: Run the complete Defou workflow: analyze, generate 5 templates with hooks, score virality, and recommend posting times for: [topic]

bestPractices: Provide raw ideas with clear context for better angle selection
Use the viral scoring to refine hooks before publishing
Follow the recommended posting times for maximum reach
antiPatterns: Do not provide content that violates platform guidelines
Do not use for generating misleading or deceptive content
Do not ignore the scoring feedback when optimizing for engagement

faq.question: What languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill outputs Simplified Chinese only. Input can be in any language but output follows Chinese content guidelines.

faq.question: Can I customize the content style?
faq.answer: The workflow follows specific Defou IP guidelines. You can adjust input topics but style remains consistent.

faq.question: Does this post to social media?
faq.answer: No. This skill generates markdown reports. You manually publish the output to your chosen platforms.

faq.question: How long should my input be?
faq.answer: Brief notes to full articles work. More context helps generate better content angles and more relevant output.

faq.question: What are the 4 hook types?
faq.answer: Counter-intuitive, pain-point focused, results-driven, and curiosity-gap hooks are generated for each content piece.

faq.question: How is viral potential scored?
faq.answer: Each piece is scored 0-25 across curiosity, resonance, clarity, and share value dimensions. Maximum 100 points.
